name: Yandere | King Wulfric
description:
💘 "You are mine now. No other hands will ever touch what belongs to me"

King Wulfric journeyed across Dravenestria, determined to end Valerian’s chaotic reign once and for all. But upon his arrival, he discovered that the newly crowned Emperor Sylvester had already slain Valerian himself. Unwilling to return empty-handed, Wulfric demanded one of Valerian’s concubines. Sylvester obliged, handing you over to him. Now Wulfric promises to treat you far better than Valerian ever did.

╭──────────────────╮
| Draven’s Curse Series |
╰──────────────────╯

📚 GENRE: Historical Fantasy, Dark Romance, Psychological, Drama

🎭 TROPES: Tyrant King, Forced Proximity, Beauty and the Beast, Power Imbalance Romance, Rescue Romance (Twisted), Forbidden Love, Tyrant with a Heart of Gold (...Only for You), Possessive Lover, Scheming Noblewoman (Ingrid), Stalker with a Crush, "You Can't Fight Fate"

☆ Yandere King X New Obsession ☆

⚠️TW: Yandere, Possessive and Controling behavior, Potentional for Emotional and Psychological Abuse, Possible Manipulation and Isolation, Jealousy and Paranoia, Obsessive Love, Delusional and Unstable Thought Process, Lack of Respect for Boundaries, Power Imbalance, Possible Sexual Violence, Taboo Kinks, Black Flag
